reviews.comment:
Un lugar muy bueno la atención de los playeros es muy buena. Un break en la ruta

(Translated by Google)
A great place, the service from the beach attendants is excellent. A nice break along the way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTMXE3ZmZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Una pena que no esté abierta x la madrugada ¡¡¡¡
Suelo pasar minimamente una vez x semana ¡¡¡¡
Tendria que tener tarjeta para la carga de combustible ¡¡¡¡ hace un mes que no funciona ...
X lo demás es un excelente lugar para repostar y muy bien atendido x todos ¡¡¡¡

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame it's not open in the early morning! I usually stop by at least once a week! They should have a card for fueling! It hasn't worked for a month... Otherwise, it's an excellent place to refuel and the service is great!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTLXJ5Rnh3RRAB

reviews.comment:

Clean bathrooms, very good vibes from the very friendly beach boys.

reviews.comment:
buena atencion baños limpios y el full bien surtido .
ojo a veces falta combustible no confiarce.

Good service, clean bathrooms, and a well-stocked kitchen.
Be careful, sometimes there's not enough fuel. Don't be too confident.
